title: arenaria armerina subsp. caesia
intro: Arenaria armerina subsp. caesia, also known as Caesia rock-cress, is a plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, as it contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are known to possess anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Caesia rock-cress include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support immune system health. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
